caption: A woman wearing a striped, button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones with an attached microphone is speaking. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall, with a pale yellow curtain and a sliver of a blue curtain visible to her right. A neutral-toned piece of furniture is partially visible behind her left shoulder. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains centered in the frame, her expression shifting as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing to form words. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of the screen across all frames. The scene remains static in terms of location and equipment, with the only movement being the woman's facial expressions and slight shifts in her posture as she communicates.
